1993October 4, 1993

🇩🇪 Berlin, Germany

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Berlin, Germany, October 4, 1993 -- October 14, 1993

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-1993-10-berlin-germany

27 Resolutions

193Plenary
Ask PMAG to answer questions regarding AICs
SC 4 asks PMAG to answer the following questions regarding AICs: 1. What is the role of AICs in STEP? 2. Who are the users of AICs? 3. Is there a requirement for AICs to become standards? 4. If (3)...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
192Plenary
Require explicit sign-off information for PMAG voting
SC 4 directs PMAG to ensure that, at that point in time when PMAG is required to vote on any Part promotion which is CD or DIS promotion, the information about sign-offs having occurred earlier is ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
190Plenary
Appoint Bernd Ingenbleek as project leader for P18
SC 4 appoints Mr Bernd Ingenbleek as project leader of project P18 on Part 201 Application protocol: Explicit draughting, and thanks Mr Peter Kruse for his contribution to SC 4/P18.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
189Plenary
Appoint Yuhwei Yang as project leader for P40
SC 4 appoints Mrs Yuhwei Yang as project leader of project P40 (WI1-WG 4-p6.2) on STEP application protocol integration and thanks Mr Steve Ryan for his contribution to SC 4/P40.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
188Plenary
Appoint Adam Polly as project leader for P39
SC 4 appoints Mr Adam Polly as project leader of project P39 (WI 1-WG 4-p2.2) on STEP resource model integration and thanks Mrs Yuhwei Yang for her contribution to SC 4/P39.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
187Plenary
Request nominations for ad hoc group on parametrics
SC 4 requests its P-members, and the conveners of Working Groups to nominate experts as participants in the ad hoc group on parametrics.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
186Plenary
Endorse ad hoc group on parametrics
SC 4 endorses the creation of an ad hoc group at the SC 4 level to address how to proceed with parametric capabilities for all SC 4 areas of scope.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
185Plenary
Request Secretariat account for ISO/TC 184 resolutions
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to take into account those Resolutions of ISO/TC 184 concerning the work of SC 4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
184Plenary
Require meeting reports distribution within 6 weeks
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to provide meeting reports, including resolutions, for distribution to member bodies within 6 weeks of each meeting of SC 4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
183Plenary
Direct WG 6 to develop Abstract Test Methods
SC 4 directs Working Group 6 to develop Abstract Test Methods to be used in assessing conformance of implementations using ISO 10303-22.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
182Plenary
Publish ISO 10303 parts as joint ISO/IEC standards
SC 4 accepts in principle that all Parts of ISO 10303 shall be published as joint ISO/IEC standards, and directs its Secretariat to work with the ISO Central Secretariat and the SC 4 Editing Commit...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
181Plenary
Appoint Neal Laurance as Convener of PMAG
SC 4 appoints Mr Neal Laurance as Convener of PMAG, and records its appreciation to Mr Jerry Weiss for his efforts in the project since its launch.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
180Plenary
Adopt document N231 as strategic policy for liaisons
SC 4 adopts document N231 (SPAG N111 V 1.2) as its strategic policy for liaisons.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
179Plenary
Direct SPAG to maintain SC 4 Strategic Policy Reference Guide
SC 4 directs SPAG to establish and maintain an SC 4 Strategic Policy Reference Guide and welcomes the proposition of SPAG to make tutorial seminars on the SC 4 strategic policy.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
178Plenary
Circulate document N230 for member body comment
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to circulate document N230 (SPAG N110 V 1.5) to its member bodies for comment.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
177Plenary
Approve separate publication of ISO 10303-22 language bindings
SC 4 approves the principle of separate publication of ISO 10303-22 language bindings, such as late FORTRAN, late C and early C++, and directs PMAG to allocate part numbers as required, on the advi...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
176Plenary
Adopt AP 225 project and appoint Wolfgang Haas as leader
SC 4 adopts project P54 "Structural Building Elements using Explicit Shape Representation" (AP 225) as part of the Work item on product data and appoints Dr Wolfgang Haas as the project leader.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
175Plenary
Adopt AP 224 project and appoint Len Slovensky as leader
SC 4 adopts project P53 "Mechanical Products Definition for Process Planning Using Form Features" (AP 224) as part of the Work item on product data and appoints Mr Len Slovensky as the project leader.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
174Plenary
Adopt AP 223 project and appoint Constantine Orogo as leader
SC 4 adopts project P52 "Exchange of Design and Manufacturing Product Information for Cast Parts" (AP 223) as part of the Work item on product data and appoints Mr Constantine Orogo as the project ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
173Plenary
Adopt AP 222 project and appoint Glen Ziolko as leader
SC 4 adopts project P51 "Exchange of Product Definition Data from Design Engineering to Manufacturing Engineering for Composite Structures" (AP 222) as part of the Work item on product data and app...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
172Plenary
Adopt AP 221 project and appoint David Leal as leader
SC 4 adopts project P49 "Functional Data and Schematic Representation for Process Plants" (AP 221) as part of the Work item on product data and appoints Mr David Leal as the project leader.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
171Plenary
Adopt AP 220 project and appoint Jack Corley as leader
SC 4 adopts project P50 "Printed Circuit Assembly Manufacturing Planning" (AP220) as part of the Work item on product data and appoints Mr Jack Corley as the project leader.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
170Plenary
Require formal ballot for CD level approval
SC 4 resolves that documents may be circulated to gather comments from all member countries using the CD procedure, but the procedure for approving a document at the CD level requires a formal ball...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
169Plenary
Establish new projects to develop Abstract Test Suites for APs
New projects shall be established to develop Abstract Test Suites for each approved STEP Application protocol. PMAG shall name a project leader for each project and shall create a project schedule ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
168Plenary
Require Abstract Test Suites for each STEP Application Protocol
For each STEP Application Protocol an Abstract Test Suite shall be developed to document the guidelines for testing implementations for conformance to the Application Protocol. Before an Applicatio...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 thanks Barbara Warthen for her efforts in initiating and supporting this work on parametrics.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 thanks DIN and ProSTEP for hosting and supporting the meeting in Berlin.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
